title: Are Dollar Store Stocks Commenting On The Economy Heading Into Holiday Shopping Season?
text: Dollar store stocks tend to hold up in economic downturns.

title: Is the Options Market Predicting a Spike in Dollar Tree (DLTR) Stock?
text: Investors need to pay close attention to Dollar Tree (DLTR) stock based on the movements in the options market lately.

title: Dollar Tree Won't Be Trading At a Discount For Much Longer
text: Despite hitting all-time highs last year as one of the best stocks to own during a recession, Dollar Tree Inc NASDAQ: DLTR has been on the defensive since the summer. Until this past August, their shares had held an almost unmatched track record of rallying before, during, and after the pandemic.

title: Dollar Tree's stock has tumbled this year. Its millions of wealthier new customers could change that, analysts say.
text: Shares of discount chain Dollar Tree Inc. DLTR, +4.38% are down 17.9% so far this year, amid concerns about still-cautious consumer spending, competition from online discounters abroad, and the possibility the company might have to spend more to attract workers and cut prices to compete.

title: Dollar Tree stock climbs toward a 4th-straight gain after Goldman turns bullish
text: Shares of Dollar Tree Inc. DLTR, +4.26% climbed 4.2% toward a fourth-straight gain in afternoon trading Tuesday, after Goldman Sachs turned bullish on the discount retailer. The stock has rallied 7.2% over the past four sessions, and has run up 10.7% since it closed at a 2-year low of $103.64 on Oct. 3.

title: Analyst Eyes Entry Point For Struggling Retail Stock
text: Shares of Dollar Tree Inc (NASDAQ:DLTR) are 2% higher premarket following a bull note from Goldman Sachs.

title: Dollar Tree (DLTR) Reveals Hiring Plans Ahead of Holiday Season
text: Dollar Tree (DLTR) plans to hire thousands of full and part-time associates on Oct 19 to ramp up its holiday season prep.

title: Dollar Tree and Family Dollar to Host Nationwide Hiring Day on Oct. 18
text: CHESAPEAKE, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) plans to hire thousands of associates during its Nationwide Hiring Day hosted at participating Dollar Tree and Family Dollar stores on Oct. 18. Positions include a variety of part-time and full-time roles, including sales associates, customer service representatives, stockers, assistant store managers and store managers. “Our National Hiring Day is a focused time for prospective teammates to discover the many roles and career pa.

title: Family Dollar to create more than 300 jobs in West Memphis
text: Dollar Tree Inc. said Wednesday it will create more than 300 new jobs in Arkansas, as it plans to return to West Memphis with the opening of a Family Dollar distribution center.

title: Family Dollar Returning to West Memphis with Transformed Distribution Center
text: CHESAPEAKE, Va.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dollar Tree, Inc. (NASDAQ: DLTR) today announced plans for Family Dollar operations to return to West Memphis, Arkansas, with a fully reimagined and refreshed distribution center. The opening of the Family Dollar distribution center will create more than 300 new jobs for Arkansas workers initially, with plans to add more in the coming years. The West Memphis distribution center will have the capacity to serve up to 1,000 Family Dollar stores in the region. Comb.

title: Dollar Tree: Not Worth My Dollars Yet
text: Dollar Tree continues to struggle with underperforming Family Dollar, facing inflationary pressures and shrinkage. The company's operating margins have fallen, and earnings per share growth has been modest. Dollar Tree expects continued shrink and recognizes the shift from a growth stock to a value stock. Activism may be a possibility in the future.
